summary: Frontend-only testing of internal app UI dark/Neon-Noir redesign. All 25 UI tests passed (100%). Dark theme (#0f172a bg) correctly applied to Chat, Dashboard, and Vocabulary pages. All components verified: Sidebar with gradient background, indigo accents, mumble logo, language pickers with search, New Chat dropdown, conversation list, footer nav; ChatHeader with glass effect and mode toggle; ChatInput with animated focus ring and glow mic button; ChatBubble with indigo user bubbles and glass AI bubbles; MessageList with framer-motion animations.
passed_tests: Chat page loads with dark theme (bg #0f172a = rgb(15,23,42))
Chat page has data-testid='chat-page'
Sidebar renders with dark gradient background (#0c1222 to #0f172a)
Sidebar shows mumble logo with indigo-400 WaveformLogo
Sidebar shows 'I SPEAK' native language picker (dark themed with search)
Sidebar shows 'LEARN' target language picker with indigo accent
New Chat dropdown opens with Free Conversation and 8 scenarios
Sidebar shows conversation list with indigo highlight for active conv
Sidebar footer shows Dashboard, Vocabulary links
Sidebar footer shows user email (demo@mumble.app) and Logout button
ChatHeader displays with glass effect (blur(16px), semi-transparent bg)
ChatHeader shows back button, conversation title
Mode toggle visible with mic/keyboard buttons
Mode toggle voice button has indigo gradient when active
Mode toggle text button has indigo gradient when active
ChatInput voice mode shows glow mic button with indigo gradient
ChatInput text mode shows textarea with animated focus ring
Send button shows indigo gradient when text is entered
Empty state shows correctly for voice mode (Tap the mic)
Empty state shows correctly for text mode with 4 quick prompts
Sending text message works - user message in indigo gradient bubble
AI response displayed in glass surface bubble (bg rgba(255,255,255,0.05))
Dashboard page loads with dark theme at /dashboard
Vocabulary page loads with dark theme at /vocabulary
Mobile responsive - sidebar overlay works (slides in/out)
critical_code_review_comments: Dark theme successfully applied with consistent #0f172a background across all internal pages
Indigo (#6366f1) gradient used consistently for primary actions and accents
Glass morphism effect (blur + transparency) applied correctly to headers and AI bubbles
Framer Motion animations present for dropdowns, bubbles, and transitions
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for robust testing
Mobile responsive design working with sidebar overlay on small screens
context_for_next_testing_agent: Internal app UI redesign to dark/Neon-Noir theme complete. All pages verified: ChatPage (#0f172a dark bg), Sidebar (gradient #0c1222 to #0f172a, indigo accents), ChatHeader (glass effect), ChatInput (animated focus, glow mic), ChatBubble (user=indigo gradient, AI=glass), MessageList (framer-motion), LanguagePicker (dark dropdown with search), DashboardPage (dark theme), VocabularyPage (dark theme). Mobile responsive sidebar overlay working. Test account: demo@mumble.app / demo123
